title: HyperJsonConfiguration
description: Configuration file for HyperJson — JSON content validation and type generation.

$schema.description: Path to the JSON schema file for IDE intellisense.

contentDir.description: Base directory for JSON content files, relative to the app root.

validation.description: Options that control how content validation behaves.

strict.description: Fail on additional properties not defined in the schema.

failOnError.description: Exit with a non-zero code when any validation error is found.
